Lyric O.WHEN - Love Spark

Romanization

Caught your glance a little too late
Heart skipped like a stone on a lake
ttadeuthan baram, geu ane nogadeul deut

haetsal arae heulleonaerideut

imi sijakdwae yeogi, i gonggane

Your voice holds every moment
i sunggammajeo neoege baraneun na

Love spark, gakkai dagaon sunggan

imi sijakdwae yeogi, i gongganen tteollim, animyeon dareun mueongga

I can’t wake up from you
I can't wake up from this dream

heeonaoji mothan
nae mameun kkok gathin geot gata
I could be there for you
I could be there just like now,
everywhere you are

Love spark, nega dagaon sunggan

imi sijakdwae yeogi, i gonggane
tteollim, sarangeul sijakhaenna bwa

이미 시작돼 여기, 이 공간에
떨림, 아니면 다른 무언가
